creator: venture37@geeklan.co.uk
text:
Attempting to build sysutils/rsyslog7 fails at the configure stage with the error " The pkg-config script could not be found or is too old.  Make sure it
is in your PATH or set the PKG_CONFIG environment variable to the full
path to pkg-config."
